section_name: Governmental Subdivision Cooperation in Aeronautic Development
text: A governmental subdivision may cooperate with the department in the development of aeronautics.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 3
### Chapter 21. Admin. of Aeronautics
##### § 21.053 — Governmental Subdivision Cooperation in Aeronautic Development

A governmental subdivision may cooperate with the department in the development of aeronautics.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: A governmental subdivision may cooperate with the department in the development of aeronautics.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
